HomeShop4-in-1 Home Pest Control Kit
Complete Solution

4-in-1 Home Pest Control Kit

Complete home protection — spray, powder, repellent & traps.

KES 3,599KES 6,232
1
Nationwide
Quality assured
M-PESA

Description

Comprehensive pest control kit with insecticidal spray, powder, snake repellent, and fly catchers. Everything you need for a pest-free home.

How to use

  • Use spray for immediate knockdown.
  • Apply powder in cracks and corners.
  • Sprinkle repellent around perimeter.
  • Hang fly catchers in problem areas.

Safety precautions

  • Keep out of reach of children and pets.
  • Wear gloves when applying powders.
  • Ventilate areas after spraying.

Specifications

Includes
Spray, powder, repellent, fly catchers
Coverage
Average 3-bedroom home
Duration
Up to 3 months
